original: While this dildo doesn’t bear the typical TamaniCorp manufacturer’s label you’d expect to find on a high class insertable, it does bear another mark corresponding to a relative unknown: one Doctor Po. According to a quick extranet search, similar toys have been found across the galaxy and almost unanimously have a sluttifying effect on those who use them. This particularly one seems primed to stretch and to strain - to prime one for capacitance with its more than four feet of turgid terran length. Who knows what other effects it could have?\n\nKnown to cause moderate amounts of taint. Check your Codex for details.
